review_summary: Plan is well-structured, spike-gated, and honors all approved design decisions, but has three must-fix issues: (1) the soft stop-guard exit-0 additionalContext mechanism contradicts the codebase's own documented CC contract (blockExit's comment states CC only feeds context back on exit 2 + continueOnBlock), (2) background_tasks 'non-empty => don't block' is too permissive and can abandon the session's OWN in-progress spec, and (3) Task 6 treats the mandatory .mcp.json re-embed as conditional when embedded-assets.ts provably contains it.

issues.title: Soft exit-0 additionalContext may be a silent no-op — contradicts codebase's own documented CC contract
issues.description: Task 2 and Truth #4 assert output(hint("Stop", reason)) at exit 0 keeps the turn alive. But src/utils/hook-output.ts:134-139 (blockExit docstring) documents the OPPOSITE: 'Exit code 2 is required — CC only acts on { decision: block } when exit code is 2 ... Exiting 0 would silently downgrade to a no-op.' The repo's existing soft-block is continueOnBlock:true + exit 2. If wrong for Stop, the guard becomes a silent no-op, undetectable by a live-smoke that only asserts JSON is emitted.
issues.suggested_fix: Fold a verification step into Task 1 spike: empirically confirm on the installed CC version whether a Stop hook exiting 0 with additionalContext keeps the turn alive. If unconfirmed, use exit-2 + continueOnBlock (documented as working) or hookSpecificOutput on a blockExit-style path. Update Truth #4 + live-smoke DoD to assert OBSERVED behavior.

issues.title: background_tasks 'non-empty => don't block' too permissive — can abandon the session's OWN in-progress spec
issues.description: The skip is unconditional on ownership. Per ownership.ts:80-81 the strongest block is 'CURRENT session owns the active in-progress plan.' Under the proposed rule, any unrelated background task lets the session stop and abandon its own IN_PROGRESS spec.
issues.suggested_fix: Scope the skip so it never overrides a self-owned in-progress block: only skip when the decision would already be a WEAKER block (orphaned/adoptable), never when ownerId === currentSessionId. Add a test asserting a self-owned in-progress plan still blocks with non-empty background_tasks.

issues.title: Task 6 re-embed of .mcp.json is mandatory, not conditional
issues.description: embedded-assets.ts:21607-21611 contains the mcpServers/sentinal/alwaysLoad block. Editing .mcp.json without re-embedding ships a timeout that never reaches installed users.
issues.suggested_fix: Make re-embed unconditional required step with a DoD checkbox + grep-in-embedded-assets Verify.

issues.title: OC session.idle only logs via client.app.log — no enforcement receives the SDK-derived decision
issues.description: OC session.idle (sentinal.ts:1135-1143) is advisory-only (warn log); OpenCode has no exit-2/deny equivalent. #3 improves warning accuracy, not enforcement.
issues.suggested_fix: Note in Task 5 + Scope #3 that OC session.idle is advisory-only; SDK active-sessions improves warning accuracy, adds no hard enforcement. Confirm matches user intent.

issues.title: MCP timeout field names are guessed, not host-verified
issues.description: Task 6 proposes CC timeout/request_timeout_ms and an unnamed 'OpenCode-supported timeout field'. Risk: shipping a key the host silently ignores.
issues.suggested_fix: Verify exact honored key per host (Context7 / changelog) and record in the spike doc. Add a runtime Verify that a slow tool is no longer killed at the old default.

issues.title: Task 5 ownership.ts signature change must be a tested cross-wave invariant
issues.description: Task 5 adds livenessProbe to resolveStopDecision — the same fn the CC guard (Task 2) calls. Must be strictly backward-compatible or it breaks the landed caller.
issues.suggested_fix: Add invariant: livenessProbe MUST be optional; omitted => byte-identical to store.isSessionAlive. Add a test; re-run the Task 2 CC live-smoke in Task 8 after Task 5.

issues.title: MCP abort DoD accepts a lingering subprocess — resource-leak boundary not bounded
issues.description: Task 7 accepts 'returns promptly even if a subprocess lingers.' Never bounds how long an orphaned check holds a MAX_CONCURRENT slot.
issues.suggested_fix: Note lingering subprocesses are reaped by runWithTimeout (bounded); confirm abort path doesn't consume a NEW activeChecks slot without releasing. Optionally add /quality-check signal pass-through.
